cases.title: Scenario matrix row for close-time absent finalization
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Close-time absent finalization block applies (FR-09, BR-13, AC-12).
Open class session exists with multiple enrolled students.
At least one enrolled student has no successful attendance record (status Pending).
At least one enrolled student has successful Present or Late check-in.
steps: Record roster state before close: pending count and per-student attendance statuses.
Execute session close processing via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close service boundary.
Query AttendanceRecord rows for all enrolled students in the session.
Compare unresolved students against those with prior success.
cases.expected: Enrolled students without successful attendance are assigned Absent per BR-13; students with existing Present or Late success retain their status; close-time absent finalization coverage row is satisfied.

cases.title: Close session transaction persists Absent rows for unresolved enrolled students
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for session lifecycle and attendance ledger modules.
Open session exists with three enrolled students: one Present via QR, one Pending with failed attempts only, one Pending with no attempts.
Assigned Lecturer is authorized for the session class section.
steps: Capture beforeState: session state Open; two students Pending, one Present.
Invoke POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close through application service with DB transaction.
Query attendance_records table for all enrolled students within same transaction boundary.
Verify session row state and closedAt timestamp are persisted.
cases.expected: Session persists as Closed with closedAt; both Pending students receive AttendanceRecord status Absent; Present student remains Present; prior rejected CheckInAttempt rows are not deleted.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Pending to Absent on session close
preconditions: Open class session exists in integration test database.
Enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Pending state with no successful check-in.
Session SM-01 state is Open.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Pending for student-session pair; session state Open.
Execute close transition on SM-01 ClassSession (Open to Closed).
Capture afterState: AttendanceRecord status and session state.
Verify no illegal intermediate states are committed.
cases.expected: beforeState Pending transitions to afterState Absent when session beforeState Open becomes afterState Closed; transition occurs only for students without successful attendance per BR-13 guard.

cases.title: Idempotent close applies BR-13 absent finalization exactly once per student
preconditions: Open session with enrolled student in Pending state and no success record.
Idempotency-Key header support is enabled for POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Real database with unique constraint on (classSessionId, studentUserId) attendance records.
steps: Issue two parallel or sequential POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close requests with the same Idempotency-Key.
Query AttendanceRecord count and status for the Pending student.
Verify audit and close summary counts are not duplicated.
cases.expected: Student receives exactly one Absent AttendanceRecord; repeated close calls return current Closed state without duplicate absent rows or inflated summary.absent count per INV-06 idempotency.

cases.title: POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close returns 200 with absent summary and roster Absent rows
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token.
Open session exists with enrolled students: two checked in (Present/Late), three without success.
Session was opened via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01).
steps: Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close with Authorization header.
Inspect HTTP status 200, data.state Closed, data.closedAt, and data.summary.absent count.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and inspect rows for unresolved students.
Verify response envelope meta fields and error is null.
cases.expected: Close returns 200 with data.state Closed and data.summary.absent matching count of students without prior success; attendance roster rows show attendanceStatus Absent for those students; Present/Late rows unchanged.

cases.title: E2E-07 primary workflow session close finalizes unresolved students as Absent
preconditions: Lecturer opens Scheduled session via POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/open (AC-01).
Section has five enrolled students; two complete successful QR check-in (Present/Late).
Three students never achieve successful check-in while session is Open.
Lecturer is assigned to the session class section.
steps: Lecturer opens session and confirms Open state.
Two students call POST /v1/check-ins with valid qrToken and receive Success outcomes.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Lecturer queries GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for full roster.
Attempt POST /v1/check-ins for one unresolved student after close (AC-05 guard).
cases.expected: End-to-end close assigns Absent to three unresolved enrolled students; two checked-in students retain Present/Late; post-close check-in is rejected with SessionClosed and no new success row.

cases.title: Alternate branch preserves Excused and Manual Present students on close
preconditions: Open session exists with four enrolled students all without QR success.
Lecturer pre-applies manual corrections within edit window: one student to Excused, one to Manual Present with required reason (AC-13).
Two students remain Pending with no manual resolution.
steps: Verify pre-close roster shows Excused and Manual Present for corrected students.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for all four students.
Inspect audit records for manual corrections remain intact.
cases.expected: Excused and Manual Present students are not overwritten to Absent per AC-12 exception; two unresolved Pending students become Absent; manual correction audit trail is preserved.

cases.title: Close does not downgrade Present or Late success records to Absent
preconditions: Open session with enrolled students holding Present, Late, and Pending statuses.
Present and Late were assigned via successful POST /v1/check-ins (AC-11).
One student remains Pending with only failed check-in attempts logged.
steps: Record attendance statuses before close for Present, Late, and Pending students.
Lecturer calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Query attendance records and verify status immutability for success paths.
Confirm Pending-only student receives Absent.
cases.expected: Present and Late records remain unchanged after close; only the Pending student without success is assigned Absent; failed attempt history for the absent student is retained.

cases.title: Non-lecturer roles denied POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close and cannot trigger absent finalization
preconditions: Open session exists in lecturer-assigned section with Pending enrolled students.
Student and SystemAuditor users are authenticated.
Assigned Lecturer bearer token is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
SystemAuditor calls POST /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/close.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same endpoint as control.
Query session state and attendance records after denied attempts.
cases.expected: Student and SystemAuditor receive 403 Forbidden or OutOfScope; session remains Open and no Absent finalization occurs from denied calls; assigned Lecturer control succeeds and triggers BR-13 absent assignment.

cases.title: Lecturer close session UI updates roster with Absent badges for unresolved students
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-05 session control page).
Open session displays live roster with mix of Present/Late and Pending students.
ConfirmActionModal copy warns about auto-absent on close per FLOW-07.
steps: Navigate to lecturer session detail page and verify Open status badge and active QR panel.
Tap Close attendance and confirm action in ConfirmActionModal.
Observe session status badge changes to Closed and QR panel is hidden.
Review PG-06 roster: Pending students show Absent danger badge; Present/Late rows unchanged.
Verify summary chips reflect updated present, late, and absent counts.
cases.expected: Browser flow reflects Closed state per UI transition rules; unresolved enrolled students display Absent AttendanceStatusCell with danger variant; roster summary updates match close API summary; Excused/Manual Present rows if present are not overwritten.
